texto: Normal” is all about perception. I mean, isn’t “normal” what the majority of people do? So what if suddenly ninety-nine people out of a hundred decide to walk their iguanas down the street while wearing a tutu? Wouldn’t the one guy who didn’t own an iguana and wear a tutu be the freak? And isn’t it the ones who seem normal on the outside who, in actuality, know where the bodies are buried in the backyard or are secretly in love with their toaster?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Margaret Lesh que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Normal” is all about perception. I mean, isn’t “normal” what the majority of people do? So what i…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, romance, sweet, com foco em sweet e ya.
